name: Diploma PLC
confidenceReason: UK serial acquirer in technical products distribution. ROIC ~15%, ROE ~20%, 14% organic revenue growth in Q1 2026. Unanimous analyst Buy. But CAGR of 12-16% is borderline on the floor.
bullCase: Solid UK-based compounder in technical products distribution. Less well-known than Halma but potentially better growth trajectory. 14% organic revenue growth is strong. Unanimous analyst consensus.
bearCase: 12-16% CAGR is borderline on the 14% floor. Less proven compounding track record than peers. Premium valuation at 30x forward P/E.
